creative_premise: Pressure released into the bell is not discarded; the newest eight releases become a finite weather score that bends later light, geometry, and pitch.

verification.method: isolated Node test execution using byte-identical committed module logic

accessibility.keyboard: Space writes pressure; S wakes sound; E erases the score
accessibility.live_region: score-writing and erase outcomes are announced
accessibility.touch: safe-area layout and large controls remain present

identity_boundary: The work is a self-contained playable artwork with its own fictional physical law. It contains no Mirror Cartographer explanation, research dashboard, worker interface, payment route, or product funnel.

deployment_claim.reason: No authoritative public hosting URL or deployment identity was available in this run. Source behavior and deterministic score logic are verified; public serving is not claimed.

rollback: Revert cc9aea2d8359767db7b09cd6cdbaa10399cd7c78 to remove surface integration.
Revert ee2ba74e718916deed762e42df1d91b7666943b8 to remove score tests.
Revert 13359eca2ab18579cc37da068933c0ca10719eb6 to remove the score module.
limits: Audio behavior was not physically verified on mobile hardware.
The score intentionally persists only for the current page session.
